description: Dangling markup injection payloads — exfiltrate page content when inline styles are allowed but scripts are blocked

payloads.description: Dangling img src — captures page content until next quote
payloads.csp_bypass: Unclosed img src attribute exfiltrates subsequent HTML to attacker server

payloads.description: Dangling anchor href — captures content via link click
payloads.csp_bypass: Unclosed href captures form tokens and sensitive data in URL

payloads.description: Dangling form + comment — captures page content as form data
payloads.csp_bypass: Form action + HTML comment consumes subsequent content

payloads.description: Dangling meta refresh — exfiltrates content via redirect URL
payloads.csp_bypass: Meta refresh not blocked by script-src CSP directive

payloads.description: Dangling CSS import — exfiltrates via style loading
payloads.csp_bypass: CSS @import not restricted when style-src allows unsafe-inline

payloads.description: Dangling table background — legacy attribute exfiltration
payloads.csp_bypass: Background attribute loads URL with subsequent HTML as query string

payloads.description: Dangling hidden input — captures CSRF token from next input
payloads.csp_bypass: Unclosed attribute value captures subsequent form tokens

payloads.description: Dangling textarea — consumes all subsequent HTML as text content
payloads.csp_bypass: Unclosed textarea swallows page content for DOM extraction
